title: Fix project_id nullability chain: type, validation, casts, findRecentActivity, non-null assertion
description: Root cause fix for project_id becoming nullable without type system update

title: Fix config default embedding dimensions 512->768 to match migration
Block session-review source from creating project-scoped memories
description: Only agent-auto is blocked, session-review is also autonomous

title: Improve error logging: docker compose setup, budget skip visibility
description: Silent failures in test setup and budget tracking

title: Fix effectiveScope bug: Guard 0b uses input.scope instead of effectiveScope
description: autonomous sources bypass project-scope restriction by omitting scope

title: Fix repository throws bare Error instead of ValidationError
description: 3 new throws in memory-repository.ts use Error not ValidationError

title: Wrap budget increment in try-catch (best-effort)
description: incrementBudgetUsed after insert has no error handling despite best-effort comment

title: Add Titan dimension validation guard
description: 768 is not valid Titan V2 dimension (256/512/1024 only). Guard at construction time.

title: Use error code not string matching for migration catch
description: server.ts uses msg.includes('connect') which is too broad

title: Fix Titan constructor default dimension 768→512
description: Constructor default dims=768 is not in VALID_DIMENSIONS [256,512,1024], will throw ValidationError on default construction

title: Fix console.error→logger.warn in budget catch
description: Budget increment catch uses console.error instead of logger.warn, violating project logging conventions

title: Fix hardcoded exceeded:false in budget response
description: Budget response hardcodes exceeded:false instead of using budgetResult.exceeded, masking threshold crossing

title: Final verification review on fix commits (round 4)
description: Run code-reviewer and silent-failure-hunter on commits from rounds 2-3 fixes (fe11c2f..80248b7) to confirm no new issues
